name: fourxs_apple_home_kit
description: Expose this Axis camera as an Apple HomeKit accessory via HAP-NodeJS running in CamScripter. 4Xs Apple Home Kit v2.2 — snapshots + live video + separate VMD and AOA motion sensors with per-source alert hold/debounce, on ARTPEC-7/8 (armhf, arm64).

scripts.try: npm run build && cross-env PERSISTENT_DATA_PATH=./localdata/ node dist/bootstrap.js
